# Pull Request Template

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation update

## Description

Describe what changed and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo build --release`
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
- [ ] I manually tested the affected flow

## Manual test notes

Include anything useful here, for example:

- search and result selection
- episode loading
- playback launch
- next/previous episode navigation
- history updates
- sub/dub switching
